title: sida hirsutissima
intro: Sida hirsutissima, also known as hairy sida, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Malvaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits associated with Sida hirsutissima include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or used topically to harness its therapeutic benefits.
